items.name: media2text
items.description: 🎵 AI 语音视频转文本 | 视频转音频、字幕提取，FunASR 离线 + 云端百炼双引擎语音转写，自动 AI 总结，支持 OSS 存储、Supabase/SQLite 历史及 Notion/飞书推送。Media-to-text platform with video processing, offline/cloud ASR, AI summary & integrations.

items.name: python_project
items.description: Developed a Secure File Vault System using Python and Flask that allows users to upload, store, and manage files with encryption. Implemented user authentication, hashed passwords, and secure file handling to ensure data privacy and access control.
